---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement to KB Factory
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / motivation**
What are you trying to do that's hard today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like KB Factory to do.

**Fit with the project's constraints**
KB Factory is deliberately **standard-library only** (no runtime dependencies),
**local-first**, and **append-only** (supersede, never overwrite). Please note
how your proposal fits these — or why an exception is warranted.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches, including doing it outside KB Factory.
